name: ReportPortal Documentation
description: Get started with ReportPortal: real-time results, ML triage, and collaborative analysis to speed decisions and improve quality with a clear test report dashboard.

overview.title: What is ReportPortal?
overview.description: Get started with ReportPortal: real-time results, ML triage, and collaborative analysis to speed decisions and improve quality with a clear test report dashboard.

sections.title: Features
sections.description: Discover ReportPortal's features like real-time reporting, AI-based defects triage, visualization of test data and more.

pages.title: Features
pages.description: Discover ReportPortal's features like real-time reporting, AI-based defects triage, visualization of test data and more.

pages.title: Unified test reporting
pages.description: Unify results from all test frameworks in one place. Streamline collaboration, real-time insights, and quality gates in a single test automation dashboard.

pages.title: Categorisation of failures
pages.description: Learn how ReportPortal streamlines defect triage with clear categories, root cause insights, and faster resolution across teams for more reliable testing outcomes.

pages.title: AI failure reason detection
pages.description: Use AI to auto-categorize failures, reduce manual triage, and speed bug discovery. ReportPortal automates test failure analytics for faster, accurate results.

pages.title: Rich artifacts in test reports
pages.description: Enrich your automation test report with logs, screenshots, videos, and network data. Simplify debugging, defect triage, and test failure analysis in one place.

pages.title: Real-time reporting
pages.description: Get live test results as executions run. Start triage early, shorten feedback loops, and improve release speed with a real-time test results dashboard.

pages.title: Visualisation of test results
pages.description: Track key metrics with real-time widgets and charts. Visualize trends, failures, and ROI on a flexible test automation metrics dashboard for faster decisions.

pages.title: Quality Gates
pages.description: Automate GO/NO-GO checks with Quality Gates in ReportPortal. Enforce standards, speed releases, and ensure reliability using aggregated test execution data.

pages.title: REST API
pages.description: Extend and integrate ReportPortal using a powerful REST API to push results, fetch analytics, and build custom reports and dashboards across your tooling.

pages.title: SCIM Server feature
pages.description: Automate user provisioning and access with SCIM in ReportPortal. Sync roles and projects from your IdP to simplify identity management and improve security.

pages.title: Test Executions
pages.description: View all test executions in one place with powerful filters and a customizable layout for faster analysis and easier troubleshooting.

sections.title: Tutorial
sections.description: ReportPortal guide. How to do test failure analysis, how to create dashboard to manage test results and use capabilities of continuous testing platform.

pages.title: Tutorial
pages.description: ReportPortal guide. How to do test failure analysis, how to create dashboard to manage test results and use capabilities of continuous testing platform.

sections.title: Installation Steps
sections.description: Explore step-by-step instructions for deploying ReportPortal, a powerful, centralized test automation tool.

pages.title: Installation Steps
pages.description: Explore step-by-step instructions for deploying ReportPortal, a powerful, centralized test automation tool.

pages.title: Hardware Requirements
pages.description: Boost performance with expert-backed configuration tips for your test automation dashboard.

pages.title: Deploy with Docker
pages.description: Make your test automation reporting more portable. Reduce the risk of configuration issues with your test reporting tool using Docker.

pages.title: Deploy without Docker
pages.description: Deploy ReportPortal without Docker for traditional server installations and custom test automation reporting tools configurations.

pages.title: Deploy with Kubernetes
pages.description: Deploy ReportPortal on Kubernetes using Helm to streamline test reporting and analysis with scalable, containerized infrastructure.

pages.title: Deploy via Google Cloud Marketplace
pages.description: Deploy ReportPortal quickly via Google Cloud Marketplace with one-click installation for scalable test automation reporting tools.

pages.title: Deploy with Minikube
pages.description: Deploy ReportPortal on Minikube for local Kubernetes testing and development.

pages.title: Deploy on Ubuntu OS
pages.description: Deploy ReportPortal on Ubuntu with Docker and Docker Compose. Follow step-by-step instructions to launch your test reporting environment efficiently.

sections.title: Installation Steps Advanced
sections.description: Explore advanced installation capabilities to optimize your test automation dashboard.

pages.title: Installation Steps Advanced
pages.description: Explore advanced installation capabilities to optimize your test automation dashboard.

pages.title: File storage options
pages.description: Configure file storage options for ReportPortal including filesystem, MinIO, and cloud storage solutions.

pages.title: Components Overview
pages.description: ReportPortal Components Overview page explains each service - Gateway, API, UAT, Analyzer, Migrations, Index, UI - to help you configure and scale your system effectively.

pages.title: Basic monitoring configuration
pages.description: Configure basic monitoring in ReportPortal to track server health, database performance, and resource usage with Telegraf, InfluxDB, and Grafana.

pages.title: Jobs configuration
pages.description: Configure ReportPortal jobs for automated data retention and cleanup to keep your system running efficiently and organized.

pages.title: Backup & Restore Guide
pages.description: Safeguard your ReportPortal data by learning how to back up and restore its PostgreSQL database and binary storage quickly and reliably.

pages.title: Maintain commands Cheat sheet
pages.description: Quickly manage and troubleshoot your ReportPortal instance with essential Docker commands for installation, backup, cleanup, and service monitoring.

pages.title: Additional configuration parameters
pages.description: Optimize ReportPortal setup with customizable parameters - ports, session timeouts, database and API settings via Docker-friendly environment variables.

pages.title: Setup TLS / HTTPS Docker Compose + Traefik v2
pages.description: Practical guide to setting up TLS/HTTPS in our test results dashboard

pages.title: Migrate one instance to another
pages.description: Efficiently migrate your ReportPortal instance to AWS by backing up and restoring PostgreSQL, MinIO, and OpenSearch data, ensuring seamless continuity.

pages.title: Scaling ReportPortal services
pages.description: Learn how to dynamically scale ReportPortal services using Docker or Kubernetes, ensuring optimal performance and reliability for your testing infrastructure.

pages.title: Deploy with AWS ECS Fargate
pages.description: Deploy ReportPortal on AWS ECS Fargate for scalable test automation reporting with serverless container management.

pages.title: Amazon Application Load Balancer Configuration Guide
pages.description: Configure Amazon ALB and NGINX Ingress Controller for ReportPortal test automation reporting tools on AWS EKS.

pages.title: Quick Start Guide for Google Cloud Platform GKE
pages.description: Deploy ReportPortal on Google Cloud Platform GKE for scalable test automation reporting tools with Kubernetes orchestration.

pages.title: Upgrading PostgreSQL for ReportPortal v24.2 and later
pages.description: Upgrade PostgreSQL database for ReportPortal v24.2 and later versions with data preservation.

pages.title: S3 Cloud Storage
pages.description: Configure S3 cloud storage for the ReportPortal Flaky Test Detection tool using AWS, MinIO, or other S3-compatible providers.

pages.title: View launches
pages.description: View and manage test launches with detailed execution data, filtering options, and real-time test reporting capabilities for comprehensive analysis.

pages.title: Operations under launches
pages.description: Manage launch operations including editing attributes, merging launches, and bulk actions to streamline test execution reporting workflows.

pages.title: Filtering launches
pages.description: Filter launches and test items using advanced criteria to quickly find specific test execution reporting data and analyze results efficiently.

pages.title: Launches/test items attributes
pages.description: Use attributes to organize and categorize test data for better test automation reporting tools performance and easier analysis across launches.

pages.title: Investigation of failure
pages.description: Investigate test failures by setting defect types, linking bug tracking systems, and performing detailed test failure analysis for better quality control.

pages.title: History of launches
pages.description: Track test execution history and trends over time to identify patterns and improve test automation metrics dashboard insights.

pages.title: Test case ID
pages.description: Link test cases with external test management systems using unique test case IDs. Track and manage test execution reporting across platforms.

sections.title: Test executions
sections.description: Manage and analyze test executions across multiple launches with powerful filters, customizable columns, and fast data refresh.

pages.title: Test executions
pages.description: Manage and analyze test executions across multiple launches with powerful filters, customizable columns, and fast data refresh.

sections.title: Analysis
sections.description: Deep into ReportPortal's advanced analysis methods for robust test automation metrics & efficient defect triaging.

pages.title: Analysis
pages.description: Deep into ReportPortal's advanced analysis methods for robust test automation metrics & efficient defect triaging.

pages.title: Auto-Analysis of launches
pages.description: Use Auto-Analysis to categorize failures with ML, reduce manual work, and link defects automatically. Speed investigations and improve accuracy with test failure analytics.

pages.title: Immediate Auto-Analysis
pages.description: Kick off Auto-Analysis before a launch finishes to flag failures sooner. Use attributes to accelerate test failure analytics and shorten feedback loops.

pages.title: Search for the similar "To investigate" items
pages.description: Find similar “To investigate” items by logs across launches to bulk apply decisions. Accelerate defect triage and simplify your test reporting tool workflow.

pages.title: ML Suggestions
pages.description: Get AI-powered suggestions for similar failures during triage. Reuse defect types, comments, and BTS links to speed analysis in your test automation dashboard.

pages.title: How models are retrained
pages.description: Learn when Auto-Analysis and ML models retrain, how data is used, and what thresholds apply to keep ReportPortal test failure analysis accurate and project-specific.

pages.title: Manual Analysis
pages.description: Use the Make decision modal to assign defect types, apply ML suggestions, and bulk update items. Streamline bug triage for a faster automation test report.

pages.title: Pattern Analysis
pages.description: Define string or regex rules to detect known error patterns. Speed up investigations and track frequent causes with the Most Popular Pattern widget.

pages.title: Immediate Pattern Analysis
pages.description: Start Pattern Analysis before a launch ends to catch issues early. Trigger via attributes and speed defect triage on large runs in ReportPortal.

pages.title: Unique Error Analysis
pages.description: Group identical errors to speed triage. See unique failures, match tests by error, and apply ML suggestions for faster, clearer test failure analysis.

sections.title: Saved searches (filters)

sections.title: Dashboards and widgets
sections.description: Explore guides for dashboard & widget management, aiding effective, real-time test failure analytics.

pages.title: Dashboards and widgets
pages.description: Explore guides for dashboard & widget management, aiding effective, real-time test failure analytics.

pages.title: Possible Dashboards in ReportPortal
pages.description: Explore the possible dashboards and widgets in ReportPortal to visualize your test results, monitor progress, and gain actionable insights.

pages.title: Reporting and metrics in ReportPortal
pages.description: With ReportPortal, you can boost your software quality by obtaining detailed test automation reports to monitor test execution, identify issues, and analyze trends for continuous enhancement.

pages.title: Work with dashboards
pages.description: Create, edit, clone, and manage dashboards in ReportPortal. Build focused views with widgets and videos to monitor releases on a live test results dashboard.

pages.title: Widget Creation
pages.description: Create widgets to visualize trends, failures, and KPIs. Use templates and filters to build a clear test automation metrics dashboard tailored to your needs.

pages.title: Manage Widgets
pages.description: Customize, resize, edit, and delete widgets on your dashboard. Organize layout and manage widget settings for optimal test automation reporting and monitoring.

pages.title: Launch statistics chart
pages.description: Track failure reasons and statuses across runs or dates with area or bar views. Zoom and click through for deeper insights on your test results dashboard.

pages.title: Overall statistics
pages.description: Visualize passed, failed, skipped, and defect types across launches. Track trends and drill into details on your test automation reporting dashboard.

pages.title: Launches duration chart
pages.description: Compare launch durations to spot slow runs and trends. Switch between all and latest modes to highlight performance in your test automation results dashboard.

pages.title: Launch execution and issue statistic
pages.description: View the latest launch’s pass/fail and defect breakdown at a glance. Click to explore details and triage on your test automation reporting dashboard.

pages.title: Project activity panel
pages.description: Monitor all project activities and user actions in real-time. Track launches, user management, and system changes using qa metrics dashboard.

pages.title: Test-cases growth trend chart
pages.description: Monitor the addition of new test cases in each launch, identify growth patterns, and assess testing coverage to optimize your test strategy.

pages.title: Investigated percentage of launches
pages.description: Track the share of Investigated vs To Investigate items by launch or date. Monitor analysis progress to improve triage on your test report dashboard.

pages.title: Launches table
pages.description: View configurable launch data in table format. Click through to explore details, track progress, and analyze results using test automation reporting tools.

pages.title: Unique bugs table
pages.description: Track unique bugs posted to bug tracking systems. View bug details, submission dates, and linked test items using QA dashboard tool.

pages.title: Most failed test-cases table (TOP-50)
pages.description: Identify top 50 most problematic test cases with failure statistics. Track the time since the last status change and detect flaky test cases.

pages.title: Failed cases trend chart
pages.description: See failed test trends over time to catch regressions early. Analyze totals by defect categories and drill into launches on your test automation dashboard.

pages.title: Non-passed test-cases trend chart
pages.description: Track non-passed test trends over time to identify quality issues. Monitor failed and skipped test percentages using QA dashboard tool.

pages.title: Different launches comparison chart
pages.description: Compare statistics between two latest launches side by side. Analyze test execution differences and track progress using qa dashboard tools.

pages.title: Passing rate per launch
pages.description: See passed vs total per launch with bar or pie views. Toggle skipped items, explore details, and drill down into tests on your test execution dashboard.

pages.title: Passing rate summary
pages.description: Analyze passing rates across multiple launches with bar or pie views. Toggle skipped items and drill down for detailed test execution reporting insight.

pages.title: Flaky test cases table (TOP-50)
pages.description: Track flaky tests that change status between runs. Identify unstable test cases and improve reliability using test automation metrics dashboard.

pages.title: Cumulative trend chart
pages.description: Track cumulative growth trends across builds and versions. Compare statistics over time with drill-down capabilities using qa metrics dashboard.

pages.title: Most popular pattern table (TOP-20)
pages.description: Explore the top 20 most popular patterns in dashboards and widgets to analyze trends and improve reporting insights effectively.

pages.title: Component health check
pages.description: Generate a detailed test automation report with passing rate of the application components.

pages.title: Table Component health check
pages.description: See which components need attention, compare metrics across builds, and quickly investigate failures to keep your system running smoothly.

pages.title: Most time-consuming test cases widget (TOP-20)
pages.description: Identify the slowest test cases with duration analysis. View top 20 time-consuming tests in table or bar format using QA dashboard tool.

pages.title: Test Case Search widget
pages.description: Find specific test cases by name or attributes across all launches. Search, filter, and drill down into test details using qa metrics dashboard.
